hook: Wanting clarity is healthy; demanding a timeline your connection has not earned is usually not.
body: The tension is not between caring and not caring. It is between proportion and panic.

hook: Some men frame urgency as honesty when what is really happening is intolerance of uncertainty.
body: Let your desire for direction stay connected to the actual stage of the bond.
